{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322061345D9C02974D05F868B465C"}"},"total":101},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7394812509291234073","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写得还是不错的，有看下去的想法，建立动物比较多的万兽基地。上辈子被男主精神控制死了的炮灰一枚，这辈子过好自己的生活后在慢慢消磨男主光环，最后杀掉。中间很少反反复复的纠缠情节，看着比较舒服。后面结尾在润笔一下就更好了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1721742869,"group_id":"7288679841832897573","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"形形色色的人生故事，各有各的立场经历，总有那么一款适合你我。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nw+3CbhFtS6QBY6wExAPOMw=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/caefaad548f14dcc8ae4dd307cf27def~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703061&x-signature=6xnHCszzaWRwuoOnw4CYTWefDkU%3D","user_id":"103285280555","user_name":"微光与暖阳"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"103285280555","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7288679841832897573","book_info":{"abstract":"丧尸+异能+空间+极寒+风暴+极热+地震+永夜……
女主杀伐果断，同伴是一只大胖橘（翠花）。
一夜之间，遍地都是行尸走肉的丧尸。
夏安歌望着窗外的丧尸陷入了沉思。
就在刚刚，她做了一个离奇的梦。
梦中她所在的世界是一本大男主小说。
而她，不是女主，不是女配，而是一个被男主设计英雄救美的死炮灰！
男主周宁晟，一路‘偶遇’七位实力高超的漂亮女配，并且利用女配们的异能，成功坐上南方霸主的位置。
周宁晟为了得到第四位女配杨玉娇的青睐，设计她和杨玉娇动手。
结局十分凄惨。
翠花被万雷穿心，而她则粉身碎骨而亡……
夏安歌有些心塞。
首先，她没惹任何人！其次她没惹任何人！最后，她没惹任何人！
就因为翠花的能力强了一点，就要被设计做炮灰？天理何在？
周宁晟是吗？南方霸主是吗？
那就让她好好瞧瞧，这位大男主周宁晟，有没有那个本事坐上南方霸主的位置！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oea8b00c03ee6e3124d72bace669bdb13~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"猫肥肥猫瘦瘦","author_id":"","book_id":"7288679841832897573","book_name":"极端末世，植物异能大杀四方","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0f0e0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":658,"name":"天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=658&name=天灾&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7288679964713419325","read_count":"785","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"426527"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.8","serial_count":"209","tags":"科幻末世,空间,末世,天灾","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/dd5cdb6706f96c6faba1d1a27f9a1689~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779315225&x-signature=KnO%2F0gt2fPLvxh%2FEAjCCguz%2FL9w%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4481219198","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"363"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322061345D9C02974D05F868B465C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读21小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":41280,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":75755,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2206},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":
